name: Currant Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground turkey and currants.
2. Add the seasoned bread crumbs, onions, celery, walnuts, soy sauce, vegetable salt, and pepper, mixing until well-blended.
3. Melt the butter in a large frying pan.
4. Form 3-inch patties from the mixture.
5. Fry the patties over medium heat.
6. Turn once when they are browned on one side.
7. Serve.
